chain.thought: Explanation: The table lists finals with outcomes; “runner-up” indicates a loss. Counting the rows marked “runner-up” (rows 1, 3, 5, 6, 9, 11, and 13) gives 7 losses.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question refers to instances of losing on specific dates, which corresponds to "runner-up" outcomes in the table. Counting the rows with outcome "runner-up" gives 7 (rows 1, 3, 5, 6, 9, 11, 13).
